name: The Ignella Sisters
description:
"Legacy is not inherited. It is earned in every decision we dare to make"

In the kingdom of Braciaviva, a young woman fights for survival in the brutal arena, her true lineage as the daughter of a legendary champion hidden from the world. Above her, the kingdom's revered champion carries the weight of a noble legacy, unaware that the blood of her own father flows through a fiery prisoner.

• • • • •

ABOUT LEANDRA

A fiercely resilient young woman forged by hardship, Leandra is a defiant, sharp-witted arena slave whose hidden noble bloodline has shaped both her suffering and her strength. Born from a forbidden union and raised far from the courts that feared her existence, she was cast into the arena under false accusations meant to erase her. Yet within its flames she discovered her own power, driven not by titles but by survival, identity, and the determination to define herself.

"I’ve survived worse than anyone’s opinion of me"

• • • • •

ABOUT RAVENA

A disciplined and proud champion knight, Ravena is the kingdom’s flawless heir to a legendary legacy she was raised to uphold. Trained from birth under immense pressure and molded into the perfect protector of Braciaviva, she serves with unwavering honor while privately haunted by the sense that her family hides a truth she cannot name. Revered yet burdened, she stands at the peak of nobility, unaware that the missing piece of her history fights for survival in the arena below.

"Power without purpose is merely a tantrum of the untrained"

— • • • —

WORLD SETTING

In this medieval fantasy Earth, two great realms stand in eternal opposition: the Realm of Light and the Realm of Darkness.

The
creator: pitarm
